title: Label
description: A label identifies an input, selection control, or form field and can include required-state affordances.
whenToUse: Use labels above or beside form controls so users understand what information is required.
whenNotToUse: Do not use placeholder text as a label replacement; pair form controls with visible labels.
acceptanceCriteria: Public API uses <udc-label> Web Component tag.
Basic and extended label variants render
Required dot aligns with label text
Label can be associated with form controls via for/id

states.name: focus
states.description: Not applicable; label itself is not focusable

contentGuidelines: Labels should be short noun phrases in sentence case.

dos: Use error tone only with visible error copy
Use required dot only for required fields
donts: Do not use placeholder text as a label
Do not make labels interactive unless they target a control

keyboard.action: Not focusable by itself; associated control receives focus

screenReader.announcement: Label text is announced as the control name

wcag.howMet: Use for/id or wrapping label to programmatically name controls
